name: Sorcerer
classBonusText: Gain 10% of mana as extra base energy shield, 10% reduced mana cost of abilities

name: Rogue
classBonusText: +150 to accuracy rating, 10% more attack speed and cast speed

name: Hunter
classBonusText: 100% increased post-encounter life recovery

name: Fighter
classBonusText: +15% to all resistances, 5% increased experience gain

name: Warrior
classBonusText: +100 to maximum life, 15% increased strength

name: Acolyte
classBonusText: 25% increased recovery from all sources

name: Arcanist
classBonusText: Chaos damage does not bypass your energy shield, 50% increased post-encounter energy shield recovery, take 15% reduced physical damage while you have energy shield

name: Druid
classBonusText: While above 50% of maximum mana 25% of damage taken is applied to your mana first, regenerate 2% of maximum mana per second

name: Guardian
classBonusText: +30 to all attributes, the inherent bonuses gained from attributes are doubled

name: Zealot
classBonusText: When you hit an enemy your base damage is rolled twice and the higher result is used, when you are hit by an enemy their base damage is rolled twice and the lower result is used

name: Juggernaut
classBonusText: +50% to armour effectiveness against elemental damage, +25% to armour effectiveness against chaos damage, when hit recover life equal to 4% of prevented damage

name: Barbarian
classBonusText: +10% chance to deal double damage with attacks, hits ignore 50% of enemy armour

name: Champion
classBonusText: Take 1% reduced damage per 4% missing life, once per stage if you would die your life is set to 1 instead

name: Mercenary
classBonusText: +5 to strength and dexterity per class level, 1% increased attack speed per 10 strength or dexterity whichever is lower

name: Windrunner
classBonusText: Permanently inflict 15% shock and 10% chill on enemies at the beginning of an encounter

name: Pathfinder
classBonusText: +50% to evasion effectiveness against hits from spells, take 20% less damage the first time you are hit during an encounter

name: Assassin
classBonusText: +8% to base critical hit chance, enemies have 25% less evasion rating against critical hits

name: Trickster
classBonusText: Enemies take 10% increased damage, enemies have 5% less speed, enemies deal 5% less damage

name: Archmage
classBonusText: +2 to the level of all abilities, 100% increased effect of attunement modifiers from abilities

name: Ascendant
classBonusText: 50% of non-chaos damage taken bypasses your energy shield, 50% of life regeneration per second also applies to your energy shield, regenerate 5% of life per second

name: Templar
classBonusText: +50% to armour effectiveness against chaos damage, recover energy shield equal to 2% of armour when you block

name: Chieftain
classBonusText: Take 25% of physical damage as fire damage, +5% to maximum fire resistance, enemies take 40% increased elemental damage

name: Destroyer
classBonusText: +25% chance to deal double damage with attacks, +1% chance to deal triple damage with attacks per 2% chance to deal double damage with attacks

name: Berserker
classBonusText: Leech 10% of hit damage as life, take 25% increased damage, 1% more melee attack speed per 1% missing life

name: Dragoon
classBonusText: +25% to maximum chance to block, enemies take 1% increased damage per 1% missing combined life and energy shield

name: Dervish
classBonusText: During a stage gain 5% increased attack critical hit chance per non-critical hit dealt up to 100% and 2% more attack speed per critical hit dealt up to 30%

name: Mirage
classBonusText: +5% to final chance to evade, recover life equal to 2% of evasion rating when you evade

name: Shadow
classBonusText: The first attack or spell cast during an encounter deals 50% more damage, your action bar is filled by 35% when you evade or dodge

name: Reaper
classBonusText: Permanently inflict 20% chill on yourself, the effect of chill on you is reversed, at the beginning of an encounter chill effects on you are reflected to enemies

name: Occultist
classBonusText: Your maximum life is 1, 40% more energy shield, deal 1% increased damage per 100 maximum energy shield
